div.p: This meeting was a continuation of the restricted session held during the morning of October 2 and involved the same principal participants assisted by one adviser each (see page 1325). A brief summary of the proceedings of this meeting is included in the telegraphic summary by the United States Delegation, October 3, on page 1324; a 19-page verbatim record of this restricted meeting is in the Conference files, lot 60 D 627, CF 368.
